signals.headline: JD Vance's Hungary Campaign Activity | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
JD Vance's Hungary Campaign Activity | YES | MED confidence**

Vice President JD Vance spent time in Hungary last week openly campaigning for Prime Minister Viktor Orbán, described as Putin-aligned, in an "unprecedented move for an American leader."[1] This activity and its political implications may influence election prediction markets, though the broader impact on 2026 midterm dynamics remains
